stories.title: Netherlands break WC record with Sweden thumping
stories.summary: Netherlands coach Ronald Koeman said their 5-1 win over Sweden on Saturday sends a warning message to their World Cup rivals. The dominant victory came on the same day his side broke a tournament record.

stories.title: Sources: Gillespie back to Suns for 4 years, $48M
stories.summary: Collin Gillespie, who is coming off a breakout campaign with the Suns, intends to sign a four-year, $48 million deal to remain with the team, sources told ESPN on Saturday.

stories.title: New UFC champ Gaethje 'planning' to fight again
stories.summary: Justin Gaethje, who upset Ilia Topuria last week to win the UFC's lightweight title, says he's "planning" on fighting again, tempering talk of his possible retirement, at least for the time being.

stories.title: Hot-hitting Oklahoma blasts UNC, on brink of title...
stories.summary: Deiten Lachance homered twice as the Sooners won Game 1 of the Men's College World Series finals 9-3 on Saturday to move within a victory of the national championship.

stories.title: Brewers' Murphy set to have hip, back surgeries
stories.summary: Brewers manager Pat Murphy said Saturday he's planning to have back surgery on Thursday, when the team is off, and a procedure on his hip during the All-Star break.
